SELECT 'SME' AS SegmentA, 'LAM' AS SegmentB,
       (a.total_consumption/12.0 - b.total_consumption/12.0) AS Difference
FROM (
    SELECT total_consumption
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment, y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.Segment ORDER BY SUM(y.Consumption) ASC) AS rn
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, y.CustomerID
    ) sub
    WHERE Segment = 'SME' AND rn = 1
) a
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT total_consumption
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment, y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.Segment ORDER BY SUM(y.Consumption) ASC) AS rn
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, y.CustomerID
    ) sub
    WHERE Segment = 'LAM' AND rn = 1
) b
UNION ALL

7:
WITH seg_year AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS yr,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' OR ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
pct AS (
    SELECT
        s2013.Segment,
        ((s2013.total - s2012.total) / s2012.total) * 100 AS pct_increase
    FROM
        (SELECT Segment, total FROM seg_year WHERE yr = '2013') s2013
    JOIN
        (SELECT Segment, total FROM seg_year WHERE yr = '2012') s2012
        ON s2013.Segment = s2012.Segment
)
SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM (
  WITH user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Id, p.Tags
    FROM posts p
    JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
    WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
  ),
  posts_no_comments AS (
    SELECT up.Id, up.Tags
    FROM user_posts up
    LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.PostId = up.Id
    WHERE c.Id IS NULL
  ),
  tags_clean AS (
    SELECT Id,
           replace(replace(replace(Tags, '<', ''), '>', ''), ' ', '') AS TagsNoBrackets
    FROM posts_no_comments
  ),
  tags_split AS (
    SELECT Id,
           substr(TagsNoBrackets, 1, instr(TagsNoBrackets, ',')-1) AS tag,
           substr(TagsNoBrackets, instr(TagsNoBrackets, ',')+1) AS rest
    FROM tags_clean
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Id,
           substr(rest, 1, instr(rest, ',')-1),
           substr(rest, instr(rest, ',')+1)
    FROM tags_split
    WHERE rest <> '' AND instr(rest, ',') > 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Id,
           rest,
           ''
    FROM tags_split
    WHERE rest <> '' AND instr(rest, ',') = 0
  )
  SELECT tag
  FROM tags_split
  WHERE tag <> ''
) AS t;	----- bird -----	codebase_community
